title: Generating an Optimized Routing Plan
scenario: Create a set of optimized routes for a logistics company with a fleet of 10 trucks and a list of 50 delivery points. The routes should minimize fuel consumption and reduce travel time. Use a graph-based routing algorithm and include specific constraints such as avoiding high-traffic roads and taking into account weather conditions.
constraints: Must use the Google Maps API
Must include a minimum of 10 routes

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated routes minimize fuel consumption and reduce travel time.
Check if the generated routes avoid high-traffic roads and take into account weather conditions.
Assess the computational efficiency of the graph-based routing algorithm used.
